title: Fit test - both earbuds are disconnected, not possible to start the Fit test [TO BE UPDATED]
scenario: Fit Test button remains disabled in Tutorials section when both earbuds are disconnected from the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Ensure both earbuds are disconnected from the app
Navigate to Tutorials / Onboarding / User Guides section
expected: The Fit Test button should be enabled and allow the user to start the Fit test from the Tutorials/Onboarding/User Guides section even when both earbuds are disconnected.
